subcodes.first_line: The leaf presented itself and sought from the Wronged One mention of thee. Thus have We made mention of thee in this perspicuous Tablet - a mention of God, exalted be He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ورقه حاضر و از مظلوم ذکرت را طلب نمود ذکرناک بهذا اللوح المبین ذکر حق جل
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @call to action, @goodly deeds; actions
